reforms.description: The Federal Government adopted a DM 300 million programme aimed at financing further employment and vocational training measures to enhance the skills of the workforce.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing workforce skills is expected to improve productivity and innovation capacity.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been adopted and is currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The programme represents a significant investment in workforce skills but is not a structural change.
reforms.source_quote: DM 300 million programme to finance further employment and vocational training measures.

reforms.description: The German government introduced a temporary 7% investment grant as part of its anti-cyclical policy to stimulate business investment and shorten the lag between demand recovery and investment decisions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Stimulating business investment is expected to enhance economic activity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The investment grant has been introduced and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The introduction of a temporary investment grant is a significant policy change aimed at stimulating the economy.
reforms.source_quote: The objective of this measure was to induce entrepreneurs to advance their investment decisions and to shorten the lag between the general demand recovery and the pickup in business investment.
